name: --dry-run emits the composite YAML on stdout and does not write the target file
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o02-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Rule alpha
prose alpha.

## Rule beta
prose beta.
MD
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/src.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o02 --source-id o02src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out --dry-run 2>e.err >stdout.txt; grep -q 'DRY-RUN' e.err && grep -q '^rules:' stdout.txt && [ ! -f $OUT/out/us-government/o02.yaml ] && echo dry-run-emits-yaml-no-write 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
